zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Bloomfield於大約1310年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Tristram Blaunfield32歲，母親Unknown31歲。她於1330年與Peter Lyte在英國薩默塞特查爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1365年在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bloomfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Jewish Blumfeld: artificial compound of Yiddish blum ‘flower’ + feld ‘field’.

English (East Anglia): from Blundeville, Norman habitational name from Blonville-sur-Mer in Calvados, France. The first element is probably an Old Norse personal name; the second is Old French ville ‘settlement’. In the 16th and 17th centuries in England, the endings -field and -ville were often used interchangeably; one branch of the Blundeville family continued using the -ville spelling while another chose Blom(e)field or Bloomfield.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Bloomfield was born about 1310, in Somerset, England, her father, Tristram Blaunfield, was 32 and her mother, Unknown, was 31. She married Peter Lyte in 1330, in Charlton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1365, in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, at the age of 56.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bloomfieldが約1310年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Tristram Blaunfieldは32歳，母Unknownは31歳であった。1330年にイギリスソメルセトチャールトンでPeter Lyteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1365年にイギリスソメルセトチャールトン マクレルで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bloomfield(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Tristram Blaunfield(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1330년 영국 서머세트 찰턴에서 Peter Lyte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1365년 영국 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Lyte в 1330 г. в местности чарлтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1365 г. в местности чарлтон маккрелл, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.
